thenandnow.title: ⏳ Then and Now
thenandnow.html:
The world is very different now from long ago. In the past, people traveled by horse. Now we travel by car, bus and airplane.

Long ago, people sent letters to talk to people far away. It was very slow! Now we use the Internet and e-mail. We can also use a tablet to video call our friends.

In the past, there were no televisions. People listened to the radio for news. Children played outside all day.

Many things changed because of communications. Now we can talk to anyone in the world in seconds! People visited other countries more easily because of airplanes.

What do you think the world will be like in the future?

transport.title: 🚌 Getting Around: Then and Now
transport.html:
How did people get around long ago? They walked or used horses. Some people traveled by boat on rivers.

Then people invented new ways to travel. Trains arrived first. People loved trains because they were fast!

Cars appeared later. At first, only rich people owned cars. Now many families have a car.

Today we have many ways to get around. We can take a bus, a truck, a motorcycle or a cable car. In big cities, people use the metro too.

Airplanes changed everything. Now people can fly to the other side of the world in just one day!
